programme.title: The Comic Bang Ep03
programme.desc: Adapted from the Japanese manga entitled "Monthly Girls' Nozaki-kun", this sweet romcom follows a girl who joins her crush's secret life as a shoujo artist after her confession goes hilariously wrong.

programme.title: The Comic Bang Ep04
programme.desc: Adapted from the Japanese manga entitled "Monthly Girls' Nozaki-kun", this sweet romcom follows a girl who joins her crush's secret life as a shoujo artist after her confession goes hilariously wrong.

programme.title: Mrs. Golden Snake
programme.desc: The Sword Sect faces Lady Golden Snake's revival after her seal breaks. Demon Qu Ling and disciple Bian Xiaoya unite to reclaim the sword and seal her.

programme.title: The Great Nobody Ep07
programme.desc: Tu Dou and Lu Yan star in a comedy with Tang Xiaotian's special appearance. Panda Fairy Ling Ling is mistaken for a king, leading with Mole Advisor to grow the demon den.

programme.title: The Great Nobody Ep08
programme.desc: Tu Dou and Lu Yan star in a comedy with Tang Xiaotian's special appearance. Panda Fairy Ling Ling is mistaken for a king, leading with Mole Advisor to grow the demon den.

programme.title: The Great Nobody Ep09
programme.desc: Tu Dou and Lu Yan star in a comedy with Tang Xiaotian's special appearance. Panda Fairy Ling Ling is mistaken for a king, leading with Mole Advisor to grow the demon den.

programme.title: The Great Nobody Ep10
programme.desc: Tu Dou and Lu Yan star in a comedy with Tang Xiaotian's special appearance. Panda Fairy Ling Ling is mistaken for a king, leading with Mole Advisor to grow the demon den.

programme.title: Drifting Away Ep04
programme.desc: Detective Peng Zhao Lin begins a ten-year hunt for four killers who evaded justice by laundering their identities. All while, he is relentlessly investigating a brutal dismemberment case.

programme.title: Drifting Away Ep05
programme.desc: Detective Peng Zhao Lin begins a ten-year hunt for four killers who evaded justice by laundering their identities. All while, he is relentlessly investigating a brutal dismemberment case.

programme.title: The Swimsuit Saga Ep15
programme.desc: A hilarious nude swim mishap unveils a rollercoaster tale of swimwear startups. A pact with a wealthy future father-in-law spawns a swimwear mogul.

programme.title: The Swimsuit Saga Ep16
programme.desc: A hilarious nude swim mishap unveils a rollercoaster tale of swimwear startups. A pact with a wealthy future father-in-law spawns a swimwear mogul.

programme.title: Second Life
programme.desc: Years ago, a little boy is born in prison and his mother was forced to give him up, losing all contact with him. When she is released, she tries her best to make amends to rebuild their relationship.

programme.title: Horror Legend Of Miao Ling
programme.desc: After the deaths of several people, allegedly from the Gu curse, Lu Wen Liang & Zhang Chi Yi venture into the secluded village in the mountains to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Qimen Mechanism Volume
programme.desc: The mysterious appearance of the Qi Men Mechanism Scroll in the Ghost Valley tomb had both the Qi and Chu kingdoms compete to obtain the treasure, resulting in heavy casualties on both sides.

programme.title: Atrocious
programme.desc: A group of travellers goes in search of ancient tombs where mysterious treasures were said to appear whenever thick fog came & ethereal sounds echoed, only to meet gruesome deaths one after another.

programme.title: Haunted Xiangxi
programme.desc: When a Feng Shui master unexpectedly falls into a trap set by the cunning Gold Old Monster, he is coerced into exploring the ancient tombs of Xiangxi for the monster's nefarious purpose.

programme.title: The EOD Team
programme.desc: Bomb disposal expert Gao Zhiyang has kept his true identity hidden from his wife for years, leading to serious marital crisis. Then, the criminal behind a bombing 8 years ago is released from prison.

programme.title: This Thriving Land Ep23
programme.desc: Portraying the rise and fall of the Ning, Feng & Fei families across two generations, as well as their entwined fates and enduring bonds forged by their struggle & love for the same land they call home.

programme.title: This Thriving Land Ep24
programme.desc: Portraying the rise and fall of the Ning, Feng & Fei families across two generations, as well as their entwined fates and enduring bonds forged by their struggle & love for the same land they call home.

programme.title: Beat The Beast
programme.desc: The town where its inhabitants were massacred by a legendary beast has turned into a ghost town and a group of migrant workers is forced to fight for their lives in a fierce battle against it.

programme.title: Drug Storm
programme.desc: Vice-captain Xiao Ruolan falls into a trap at the border. Her substitute joins the police to fight Chen Qiang. Real vs fake, bullets fly—who will survive and have the last laugh?

programme.title: Treasure Hunting Of The Dragon In Shanghai Beach
programme.desc: At end of the 19th century, patriot hero Liang Chao entrusted his closest friend Li Tian Feng with the secrets to a hidden treasure, urging Li to unearth the treasure for the sake of the nation.

programme.title: Huang Jin Gui Shi Lu Film Series
programme.desc: With the influential sects at the brink of war, County Chief Lu instructs Chief Detective Duan Guang Long & siblings, Xue Xiao Feng & Xue Xiao Hua, to conduct a secret investigation on the matter.

programme.title: The Legend Of Man And Loong
programme.desc: The Huan Long family has lived with & fought alongside dragons since ancient times. However, after a betrayal, all the dragon kings were sealed into the Nine Dragon Wall.

programme.title: The Strange Beast Of Silent Island
programme.desc: Married couple Ye Bo Ming and Yi Lin are engaged in aquaculture on a remote island. During her cousin's visit, a strange bloodthirsty beast trapped in a mine is accidentally released.

programme.title: Guardian Of Graveyard
programme.desc: Treasure hunters Xun Ye, Feng Yao, Cai Qing Yun, Wang Ya Zi & others encounter various dangers as they seek treasure at Qinling Phoenix Mountain, even averting conspiracies & diplomatic issues.

programme.title: Bath Heaven
programme.desc: In the vibrant yet challenging land of Northeast China, a pair of feuding father and son is at odds over business philosophies, resulting in the son leaving his home.

programme.title: The Swimsuit Saga Ep17
programme.desc: A hilarious nude swim mishap unveils a rollercoaster tale of swimwear startups. A pact with a wealthy future father-in-law spawns a swimwear mogul.

programme.title: The Swimsuit Saga Ep18
programme.desc: A hilarious nude swim mishap unveils a rollercoaster tale of swimwear startups. A pact with a wealthy future father-in-law spawns a swimwear mogul.

programme.title: The Drunken Prodigy
programme.desc: A spoiled young man with a passion for martial arts loses his entire fortune when he falls victim to a series of traps set by malicious gang while pursuing the top courtesan.

programme.title: Extreme Speed Police-The War on Drugs
programme.desc: Based on a true drug case, this gripping tale follows anti-narcotics officers risking their lives in deadly missions, vowing to wipe out drugs and safeguard the peace of the people.

programme.title: The Chi Dragon Slash
programme.desc: At the end of the Tang Dynasty, Navy General Qian Liu set off to exterminate the river pirates, only to discover a mystical two-headed beast called the Chi dragon in a cave.

programme.title: Baoliezhuiji
programme.desc: Shang Xia is an honest, kind-hearted & funny chauffeur. But his friend, He Feng, is a lustful gambler who often gets into difficult situations that require Shang Xia to bail him out.

programme.title: Desert Monster
programme.desc: An exploration team, which includes Liu Meng Xi & Xia Xuan, is sent to a biological laboratory. When disaster struck, the two barely escapes with samples of the mutant creature that attacked them.

programme.title: This Thriving Land Ep25
programme.desc: Portraying the rise and fall of the Ning, Feng & Fei families across two generations, as well as their entwined fates and enduring bonds forged by their struggle & love for the same land they call home.

programme.title: This Thriving Land Ep26
programme.desc: Portraying the rise and fall of the Ning, Feng & Fei families across two generations, as well as their entwined fates and enduring bonds forged by their struggle & love for the same land they call home.

programme.title: Mistery Of Error
programme.desc: Under siege from the feudal lords, emperor Zhou Su Wen relies on a special technique to transform himself in order to survive. Living in the village, he learns the meaning of responsibility & justice.

programme.title: Sword Sovereign: Heavenbreaker
programme.desc: Many years ago, Jian Nan Tian is kidnapped by Xue Yu Lou while protecting the Sword Sect. Many years later, Xue Yu Lou strikes again, attacking the Sword Sect to capture Nan Tian's son, Jian Wu Shuang.

programme.title: The Secret Book Of Oolong In New Oolong Academy
programme.desc: Huai Qiu, a senior uncle from the New Oolong Academy, is determined to master the most powerful martial arts technique and will stop at nothing to seize the secret book of Oolong.

programme.title: The Hero
programme.desc: Dong Lu is kicked out by his wife & becomes a basement manager through the introduction of his ex-classmate. His interest is peaked when he learns that there is hidden treasure in the basement.
